历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 4561→5490→5706→6153→7400, showing a continuous backward trend. Over the past 4 years, the cumulative backward shift is about 2839 places, with an average annual shift of about 710 places. The 2025 baseline is about 7400 places, a decrease of 1247 places compared to 2024, a significant drop. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Guangxi was 314 in 2021, 311 in 2022, 312 in 2023, 312 in 2024, and 309 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 318, an increase of 9 (+2.9%) compared to 2025, a slight expansion, leading to slightly intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. Ranked 27th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with a stable range of 23–27 in recent years, belonging to the top national universities. The 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving the former president Zhang Yaoxue being investigated for serious violations of discipline and law, which may have a slight inhibitory effect on application psychology. Douyin heat ranking is 85th overall, with average evaluation and no significant heat fluctuation. There were records of admission gaps or abnormal cut-off lines in 2024–2025, but the overall impact is limited. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 13 disciplines rated A- or above: Metallurgical Engineering A+, Nursing A+, Materials Science and Engineering A, Clinical Medicine A-, Transportation Engineering A-, Computer Science and Technology A-, Control Science and Engineering A-, Mechanical Engineering A-, Civil Engineering A-, Chemical Engineering and Technology A-, Basic Medicine A-, Management Science and Engineering A-, and Marxist Theory A-. Medicine, computer science, and materials have outstanding strengths, highly related to the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation are highly recommended with social heat. Clinical Medicine and Stomatology continue to be relatively hot. Materials and Chemical Engineering are generally wait-and-see. In 2026, the total number of examinees in Guangxi is about 392,000, an increase of about 12,000 (+3.2%) compared to 2025. The estimated number of Physics Category examinees is about 269,000, an increase of about 8,500 (+3.3%) compared to 2025, intensifying competition. Central South University is located in Changsha, Hunan, adjacent to Guangxi, with strong regional preference. The university's enrollment in Guangxi for Physics Category accounts for about 3–4% of the total national plan, at an upper-middle level, with stable enrollment proportions in recent years.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the slight expansion in 2026 (+2.9%), the increase in Physics Category examinees in the province (+3.3%), and the slightly negative reputation, competition is expected to further intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 7400 places. The predicted minimum ranking is about 7559 places, with a range of 7059–8059 places.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 7559 places, with a range of 7059–8059 places. For rankings within the range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors (Clinical Medicine Eight-Year Program, Stomatology, Computer Science) as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit (<7059 places), focus on Tier 1 medical and computer majors. For rankings near the upper limit (>8059 places), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 majors supplemented by Tier 2. Central South University has strong disciplines in medicine, computer science, and materials, with sustained application heat. It is recommended to combine personal interests with discipline evaluation levels for a comprehensive choice.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category fluctuated significantly: approximately 709 → 726 → 645 → 757 → 936. The 2025 baseline is about 936, which is 179 places lower than 2024, marking the lowest level in the past five years. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Guangxi was 23 students each year from 2021 to 2025, and the 2026 plan is 21 students, a decrease of 2 students (-8.7%) compared to 2025, indicating a reduction in enrollment, which slightly eases competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science ranking, it is 27th on the main list, with stable rankings in the 23–27 range in recent years, placing it among the top universities nationwide. The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly due to the former president Zhang Yaoxue being investigated for serious violations of discipline and law, which may slightly suppress application enthusiasm. Its Douyin popularity ranks 85th overall, with average reviews and no significant fluctuations. In the fifth round of discipline evaluations, it has 13 disciplines rated A- or above, including Marxist Theory A- (corresponding to social science directions in law, Chinese language and literature, etc.) and Nursing A+ (not directly corresponding to liberal arts enrollment majors). The liberal arts enrollment majors mainly include Law, Chinese Language and Literature, Foreign Languages and Literatures, and Finance.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has a socially recommended/relatively hot popularity; Chinese Language/Literature is recommended/relatively hot; Foreign Languages and Literatures are generally wait-and-see; Finance/Economics/Economy is polarized wait-and-see. In 2026, the total number of Guangxi Gaokao examinees is about 392,000, with an estimated 123,000 History Category examinees, an increase of about 3,900 (+3.3%) compared to 2025, intensifying competition. Central South University is located in Changsha, Hunan, adjacent to Guangxi, with a strong regional preference. The university's enrollment for History Category in Guangxi is stable at 21–23 students, a moderate level.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as significant historical ranking fluctuations, a reduction in enrollment in 2026 (-8.7%), an increase in History Category examinees in the province (+3.3%), and a somewhat negative reputation, the downward effect on ranking (easier admission) due to enrollment reduction slightly outweighs the upward effect from increased examinees. Based on the 2025 baseline of 936, competition is expected to ease slightly. The predicted minimum ranking is about 872, with a range of 741–1003.
